description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular walled plot, featuring a flat roof and a spacious open layout. The building is surrounded by a manicured lawn, several evenly spaced trees, and a small pond in one corner, with a driveway leading to a covered garage. The structure includes multiple large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and views of the landscaped garden. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray tone, complemented by darker accents and a paved patio area. The property is enclosed by a low, solid boundary wall, ensuring privacy and security. Additional features include a water tank, outdoor seating, and a small utility shed.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped grounds enclosed by a boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a clear view of the landscaped garden and pond.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, driveway, and a row of trees along the boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the bungalow with patio space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pond, utility shed, and more of the garden and outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
